testimonials.name: Rafiq Ahmed
testimonials.comment: The smoked brisket here is absolutely incredible! Tender, flavorful, and melts in your mouth. Best BBQ spot in Dhanmondi, no doubt.

testimonials.name: Nusrat Jahan
testimonials.comment: Bangla Kuthir section is a hidden gem — the Nababi Thali is a royal feast! Love the cozy ambiance and the lakeside view.

testimonials.name: Tanvir Hasan
testimonials.comment: Tried the Italian Ground Beef Steak from Pushkin menu — absolutely world-class! The matcha drinks are unique and refreshing too.

testimonials.name: Sadia Rahman
testimonials.comment: Best date night spot in Dhaka! The Browny on Fire dessert is a showstopper. Premium feel at reasonable prices.

testimonials.name: Imran Khan
testimonials.comment: The Smoke House Quick Bite Platter 'Dudes' is perfect for hangouts with friends. Huge portions and amazing smoky flavors!

testimonials.name: Fatima Akter
testimonials.comment: Great food and excellent service. The lakeside view makes dining here a wonderful experience.
